mapper.insert: INSERT INTO activity_collect (user_id, activity_id, create_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{activityId}, NOW())
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM activity_collect WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND activity_id = #{activityId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM activity_collect WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND activity_id = #{activityId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM activity_collect WHERE activity_id = #{activityId}
